LanguageData.USAC_Bullet_HeavyMachineGun.label: heavy machine gun bullet
LanguageData.USAC_Turret_HMG.label: Heavy sentry gun
LanguageData.USAC_Turret_HMG.description: A multi-purpose heavy machine gun with a lightweight composite material frame and improved design, it is widely used in various weapon platforms and fixed defensive facilities. In the distant past, it was a very successful alternative to the M2 heavy machine gun.
